member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.CertificateIssuanceService
member.summary: Service for issuing X.509 certificates using KAZ-SIGN-256. Implements certificate creation from CSRs with CA signature.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.ICaKeyProvider
member.summary: Interface for providing CA key material.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.DerBuilder
member.summary: Simple DER builder for constructing ASN.1 structures.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.CsrParserService
member.summary: Service for parsing PKCS#10 Certificate Signing Requests (CSRs). Implements ASN.1/DER parsing with KAZ-SIGN-256 signature verification.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.Asn1Reader
member.summary: Simple ASN.1/DER reader for parsing CSRs.

member.name: T:PqcIdentity.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.FileBasedCaKeyProvider
member.summary: File-based CA key provider for development/testing. In production, use HSM-based provider.

member.name: P:PqcIdentity.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.CaKeyOptions.PublicKeyPath
member.summary: Path to the CA public key file.

member.name: P:PqcIdentity.Certificate.Infrastructure.Services.CaKeyOptions.SecretKeyPath
member.summary: Path to the CA secret key file.
